name: General Power of Appointment Override

eligibility.description: Requires the trust instrument to grant a beneficiary a general power of appointment that was exercisable immediately before the decedent's death.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Property is not included in the gross estate as a transfer taking effect at death if a beneficiary could have obtained the property during the decedent's life through the exercise of a general power of appointment.
